title: Mjolnir Mace
description: Adds Mjolnir (Thor's hammer} as a Mace upgrade
body:
## Adds a new Mace upgrade that makes it **MUCH** more powerful

![mjolnir recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f3b2e2ffacf2417266aa3b4458a269f2b1d9800.png)

## Abilities
### Smash
![smash](https://i.imgur.com/iFTdnJk.gif)

Same as the Mace except it damages anyone around the target while striking them with lightning

### Throw
![throw](https://i.imgur.com/2DlRbq7.gif)

Thrown Mjolnir pierces through every mob and comes back after a couple of seconds

### Full Power
![full power](https://i.imgur.com/dS2UJ5p.gif)

Hitting a smash from more than 64 blocks will deal high damage with a devastating explosion

### Flight
![flight](https://i.imgur.com/fSBV3u6.gif)

Trying to throw Mjolnir while crouching will cause you to fly in that direction

## Enchantments
### Remote Striker
![enchantment gif](https://i.imgur.com/5fXH3fb.gif)

Thrown Mjolnir strikes hit mobs with lightning

### Fully Charged
![enchantment gif](https://i.imgur.com/YUsYgd2.gif)

Any melee hit with the Mjolnir spawns lightning

### Original
Removes the enchantment glint
